race.comment: MONTE TREMEZZO (4) comes back in grade today after missing by 1.3L at Belmont last start in Saturday grade. Fiore hops back on board today and back out to 1300m is no issue. Remaining on top of the ground is a big tick and with some luck in running, she can get back to winning ways. MILLSTEE (11) is third-up now and while she has drawn wide, that doesn't hurt with her racing pattern. She's building nicely into the campaign and her profile suggests she has another level to go to. Building nicely and she can get back to winning ways today. CELEBRITY PRINCE (5) is racing well without winning lately, missing by 2.6L at Kalgoorlie last time out. Pike hops back on board today and he's won 2/5 when partnering. Winkers go back on today and he can fire a shot. MY HIDDEN UNIVERSE (1) can give them something to chaser from the front. AIN'TSOBAD (8) will be fitter for the fresh effort and a forward showing is on the cards.
